terms-one-content: Welcome to the Dubai Police Online Store. These Terms and Conditions govern your use of this e-commerce platform. By accessing the site, creating an account, or making a purchase, you agree to comply with and be bound by these terms. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our services.
terms-two-content: To purchase items or access certain features, you may be required to register an account. You are responsible for keeping your credentials confidential and preventing unauthorized access to your account. You agree to accept responsibility for all activities and transactions that occur under your account.
terms-three-content: All orders are subject to product availability and acceptance. Certain specialty items, restricted uniforms, badges, and tactical equipment are strictly reserved for verified Dubai Police personnel. We reserve the right to verify user IDs and cancel orders that violate these eligibility requirements.
terms-four-content: All prices listed on the platform are in United Arab Emirates Dirhams (AED). Full payment is required at the time of placing an order. We reserve the right to modify prices, products, or services at any time without prior notice, and to cancel or refuse orders in the event of pricing errors.
terms-five-content: We deliver products within the United Arab Emirates. Delivery times and shipping fees vary depending on the destination and are calculated at checkout. Customers are responsible for ensuring accurate delivery addresses. Any delivery issues must be reported to our support team within the specified timeframe.
terms-six-content: These Terms and Conditions are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the Emirate of Dubai and the federal laws of the United Arab Emirates. Any dispute arising under or in connection with these terms shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the Courts of Dubai.
